chunks.text: Undergraduate Diversity Programs - EECS at Berkeley Undergraduate Diversity Programs The EECS Department sponsors a number of undergraduate research and support programs geared to underrepresented groups. Our two affiliated colleges also offer special graduate recruitment programs. Broadening Participation in EECS The EECS department is committed to fair treatment, access, opportunity, and advancement for all students at every stage of their education and career development. The BPE website offers updated and focused information to encourage and spark the interest of a diverse variety of students. View BPE Resources Computer Science Scholars Program Offers a “home” within Cal for students from underserved backgrounds who might not have had access to resources that prepare them to succeed in computer science. Learn More About CS Scholars SRC Intel Undergraduate Research Opportunity Undergraduates are matched with faculty mentors for sustained summer or academic year semi-conductor research. Learn More About SRC-URO Computer Science Kickstart Program A one-week introductory class to computer science targeting incoming UC Berkeley students who are curious about computer science . Learn More About CS Kickstart Summer Undergraduate Program in Engineering Research at Berkeley Undergraduates are invited to spend 9 weeks on campus over the summer conducting research on “Collecting and Using Big Data for the Public Good” with supervision from EECS faculty and grad students. Learn more about SUPERB L&S Berkeley Science Network (BSN) A College of Letters & Science program designed to increase the number of underrepresented students who acquire advanced degrees in STEM fields. Learn More About BSN COE Engineering

Data for the Public Good” with supervision from EECS faculty and grad students. Learn more about SUPERB L&S Berkeley Science Network (BSN) A College of Letters & Science program designed to increase the number of underrepresented students who acquire advanced degrees in STEM fields. Learn More About BSN COE Engineering Preview Days Junior year students selected for this College of Engineering program are guided by faculty to put together a competitive Ph.D. application to Berkeley. Learn More About Preview Days Engineering programs for diversity, equity and inclusion A selection of programs which support first-generation students, underrepresented minorities, women, transfer students, veterans and others, which help our students develop academically, professionally and as leaders. Learn more about engineering student programs Campus-wide programs for diversity, equity, and inclusion The UC Berkeley Division of Equity and Inclusion provides programs and services to support all campus community members. Learn about campus programs Can You See Yourself Doing Research This Summer? Research allows you to pursue your interests, to learn something new, to hone your problem-solving skills and to challenge yourself in new ways. Experience Summer Research View Open Faculty Positions
